summary: I am a Java Full Stack Developer with over {{yearsExperience}} years of experience building scalable web applications using React.js and Spring Boot. I design RESTful APIs, implement secure authentication with JWT/RBAC, optimize PostgreSQL, SQL Server, and MongoDB workloads, and modernize legacy systems into Spring-based architectures.

experience.description: Designed and developed the WelHire recruitment platform using Spring Boot and React.js, implemented CV parsing and JD-CV matching, built secure APIs with JWT/RBAC, and optimized PostgreSQL/MongoDB queries with async processing.
highlights: Implemented JWT auth and role-based access control.
Added async processing and scheduled pipelines.

experience.description: Designed and developed scalable backend APIs using Spring Boot and MySQL while building reusable React components following Atomic Design principles. Integrated Storybook for component documentation and testing.
highlights: Developed RESTful APIs using Spring Boot.
Built reusable UI components with React.js.
Wrote unit and integration tests using JUnit and Mockito.

experience.description: Developed and maintained government web portals using Java, React.js, and Spring Boot. Played a key role in migrating legacy Struts applications to Spring MVC, improving scalability and maintainability.
highlights: Migrated Struts-based applications to Spring MVC.
Developed REST APIs using Spring Boot.
Optimized PostgreSQL and SQL Server queries.
Integrated third-party APIs including Aadhaar, OTP, and BIE.
Supported CI/CD and deployment processes using Git.

projects.name: WelHire - AI-Powered Recruitment Automation
projects.label: Enterprise System
projects.description: Built a microservices-based recruitment platform using Spring Boot, React.js, and TypeScript. Implemented CV parsing, JD-CV matching, AI-driven scoring, and automated interview scheduling with secure JWT/RBAC APIs and optimized PostgreSQL + MongoDB workflows.
projects.impact: Improved recruitment automation, reduced manual scheduling effort, and increased candidate evaluation accuracy.

projects.name: DOST - Student Admission Portal
projects.label: Government Portal
projects.description: Developed a large-scale government admission portal using Java, Spring Boot, React.js, Thymeleaf, and PostgreSQL. Integrated Aadhaar verification, OTP authentication, and board exam verification APIs to streamline admissions.
projects.impact: Reduced manual verification effort and improved student admission processing.

projects.name: EKALYAN - Scholarship Distribution System
projects.label: Scholarship Platform
projects.description: Built a secure scholarship management system using React.js, Spring Boot, Thymeleaf, REST APIs, and SQL Server. Implemented JWT authentication and optimized backend APIs for large beneficiary datasets.
projects.impact: Improved scholarship workflow reliability and supported timely disbursement.

projects.name: Diet Plan for Couch Vastav
projects.label: Application
projects.description: Developed a full-stack diet planning application using React.js for frontend and Spring Boot for backend. Designed optimized PostgreSQL schemas and implemented Redux for state management.
projects.impact: Improved data organization and user experience for diet planning workflows.

projects.name: Appsmith - Dynamic UI & API Platform
projects.label: Enterprise System
projects.description: Designed and implemented dynamic UI screens using React.js following Atomic Design principles. Integrated backend APIs using Spring Boot and documented APIs with Swagger.
projects.impact: Enabled scalable data-driven pages based on selected schemas and sources.
